# app-04817-mention — scripts

Send blocked funnels in ecommerce. Use when tracking pending key changes, tracking incomplete session changes, tracking pending group changes, tracking discounted sprint changes. Returns matching rows with metadata. Supports filtering by inactive applicant fields.
